LanguageData.TITAN_No7_AcidThrumbo.label: No.7 — Acid
LanguageData.TITAN_No7_AcidThrumbo.description: Project TITAN No.7 — Toxin Metabolism Alternative Pathway Offset. Body fluids, saliva, and horn surface covered in lethal mixed toxins. Complete poison immunity.
LanguageData.TITAN_No13_SwampThrumbo.label: No.13 — Abyss
LanguageData.TITAN_No13_SwampThrumbo.description: Project TITAN No.13 — Combat Instinct Enhancement (Restricted). Most dangerous derivative, extremely low armor — a pure killing engine.
LanguageData.TITAN_No26_ToyThrumbo.label: No.26 — Guardian
LanguageData.TITAN_No26_ToyThrumbo.description: Project TITAN No.26 — Social Behavior Enhancement (Non-military). Only large dog-sized, zero filth, zero wildness, never fights back.
LanguageData.TITAN_No42_AuroraThrumbo.label: No.42 — Aurora
LanguageData.TITAN_No42_AuroraThrumbo.description: Project TITAN No.42 — Extreme Cold Adaptation + Bioluminescence. Sleeps peacefully at -150°C. The only subject that refuses to eat trees.
LanguageData.TITAN_No45_FireThrumbo.label: No.45 — Furnace
LanguageData.TITAN_No45_FireThrumbo.description: Project TITAN No.45 — Thermal Metabolism Redirection. Core temp 230°C, nearly incombustible. Produces 18 chemfuel every 3 days.
LanguageData.TITAN_No50_DesertThrumbo.label: No.50 — Wasteland
LanguageData.TITAN_No50_DesertThrumbo.description: Project TITAN No.50 — Extreme Metabolic Throttling. Hunger rate only 0.25, loses only 7% body weight after 30 days without food.
LanguageData.TITAN_No64_PrairieThrumbo.label: No.64 — Bastion
LanguageData.TITAN_No64_PrairieThrumbo.description: Project TITAN No.64 — Bone-Keratin Super-mineralization. Sharp armor 0.95 near pure steel plate, pain threshold 0.95. Two sides of the same coin as No.13.
LanguageData.TITAN_No88_JungleThrumbo.label: No.88 — Bloom
LanguageData.TITAN_No88_JungleThrumbo.description: Project TITAN No.88 — Symbiotic Fungal Implantation + Plant Metabolic Bypass. Produces 4 herbal medicine every 4 days. Flammability 1.2 — a fatal fire weakness.
LanguageData.TITAN_ThrumboPrototype.label: Prototype #0
LanguageData.TITAN_ThrumboPrototype.description:
The ultimate product of the Empire's Xenobiology Department "Project TITAN." Her fur shimmers with a faint golden hue — the mark of royal genes.

She possesses powerful self-regeneration and cannot be truly killed (only incapacitated).

Features:
- Periodically sheds [Golden Scales]
- Attracts wild thrumbos upon reaching adulthood
- Active ability: Titan Resonance
LanguageData.TITAN_Spark.label: Spark
LanguageData.TITAN_Spark.description:
A strangely mutated boomrat. She was Prototype #0's only friend back in the laboratory.

Features:
[Phoenix Protocol] Upon receiving lethal damage, instead of dying, she triggers a massive explosion and enters forced hibernation reboot.
[Bond] Gains combat bonuses when near Prototype #0.
LanguageData.TITAN_Hunter.label: Imperial Hunter
LanguageData.TITAN_Hunter.description: A bioweapon bred by the Empire specifically to recover "Project TITAN" experiment subjects.\n\nEngineered from warg genes, with pain and fear removed and muscles perpetually in a blood-rage state. Their brain contains only one directive: hunt #0.
LanguageData.TITAN_Warlord.label: Warlord
LanguageData.TITAN_Warlord.description:
One of the Three Legendary Beasts. Age: Unknown (ancient).

Features:
- Immortal
- Aura: Blood Frenzy
LanguageData.TITAN_VoidWalker.label: Void Walker
LanguageData.TITAN_VoidWalker.description:
One of the Three Legendary Beasts. Age: Unknown (ancient).

Features:
- Immortal
- Extremely high dodge + shield
- Aura: Void Veil
LanguageData.TITAN_Matriarch.label: Matriarch
LanguageData.TITAN_Matriarch.description:
One of the Three Legendary Beasts. Age: Unknown (ancient).

Features:
- Immortal
- Aura: Life Bloom
LanguageData.TITAN_PrototypeScale.label: Prototype #0's Shed Scale
LanguageData.TITAN_PrototypeScale.description:
A scale shed from Prototype #0, still emitting a faint golden glow and special pheromones.

These pheromones have no effect on ordinary creatures, but seem to attract the one who has always guarded her.

Usage:
Select a colonist -> Right-click the scale -> "Activate Signal."
LanguageData.TITAN_HunterGland.label: Mutant Gland
LanguageData.TITAN_HunterGland.description: An unstable biological gland extracted from a Hunter. Though unsuitable for conventional synthesis, its stored bio-energy is highly valuable on the black market; many collectors pay premium prices.
LanguageData.TITAN_Incense.label: Gene Incense
LanguageData.TITAN_Incense.description:
A bundle of incense sticks blended from special herbs and chemicals. When burned, it releases pheromone smoke undetectable to humans but irresistible to certain imperial creatures.

This is where "Project TITAN" begins.

Usage:
Select a colonist -> Right-click the incense -> "Burn Incense."
LanguageData.TITAN_GrowthPaste.label: Gene Compensation Paste
